core.label: MATLAB Fundamentals
core.description: Environment, matrices, arrays, and basic operations.

topics.label: MATLAB Environment
topics.description: Navigate the MATLAB desktop — Command Window, Workspace, Editor, and help system.

topics.label: Variables & Data Types
topics.description: double, char, string, logical, cell, struct. MATLAB is dynamically typed with matrices as default.

topics.label: Matrices & Arrays
topics.description: Create, index, and manipulate matrices. Matrices are MATLAB's core — the name means MATrix LABoratory.

topics.label: Matrix Operations
topics.description: Element-wise (.*) vs matrix (*) operations, transpose, inverse, eigenvalues.

topics.label: Indexing & Slicing
topics.description: Linear indexing, colon operator, logical indexing. MATLAB uses 1-based indexing.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elseif/else, switch, for, while, break, continue. Prefer vectorized operations over loops.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: Define functions in .m files with input/output arguments. Functions are MATLAB's primary code organization.

topics.label: Scripts vs Functions
topics.description: Scripts share workspace, functions have local scope. Understand when to use each.

topics.label: String Operations
topics.description: Modern string arrays vs legacy char arrays. Use string for new code.

topics.label: Cell Arrays & Structs
topics.description: Heterogeneous containers (cell) and named-field records (struct). Flexible data organization.

core.label: Plotting & Visualization
core.description: 2D/3D plots, figure customization, and data visualization.

topics.label: Basic Plotting
topics.description: plot, scatter, bar, histogram. MATLAB's plotting capabilities are a major strength.

topics.label: Figure Customization
topics.description: Titles, labels, legends, axes, colors, and line styles. Publication-quality figures.

topics.label: Subplots & Layouts
topics.description: Multiple plots in one figure with subplot and tiledlayout.

topics.label: 3D Plots
topics.description: surf, mesh, contour, plot3. Visualize 3D data and surfaces.

topics.label: Importing Data
topics.description: readtable, readmatrix, load, csvread. Import from CSV, Excel, text, and MAT files.

topics.label: Tables
topics.description: Tabular data with named columns using table. The modern way to handle structured data.

topics.label: Linear Algebra
topics.description: Solve systems (A\b), decompositions (lu, qr, svd, eig). MATLAB excels at linear algebra.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: try/catch, error(), warning(), assert(). Handle errors gracefully in MATLAB.

topics.label: Object-Oriented Programming
topics.description: Define classes with classdef, properties, methods, and inheritance.

topics.label: Vectorization & Performance
topics.description: Replace loops with vectorized operations. Pre-allocate arrays and use profiler.

topics.label: Debugging
topics.description: Set breakpoints, step through code, inspect variables. MATLAB's debugger is integrated in the editor.

topics.label: Testing Framework
topics.description: Write unit tests with matlab.unittest. Test functions and classes systematically.

topics.label: App Designer
topics.description: Build interactive GUIs with App Designer's drag-and-drop interface.

topics.label: MEX Files & C Integration
topics.description: Call C/C++ from MATLAB for performance-critical code.

topics.label: Symbolic Math
topics.description: Symbolic computation with the Symbolic Math Toolbox. Solve equations analytically.

topics.label: Live Scripts
topics.description: Combine code, output, and formatted text in interactive documents.
